test_cases.title: Create User API - valid POST request succeeds
steps: Send a valid POST request to /api/users
test_cases.expected_result: Request succeeds and returns the expected response payload.

test_cases.title: Create User API - missing required field returns validation error
steps: Send a POST request to /api/users with a required field removed
test_cases.expected_result: API returns a validation error for missing required fields.

test_cases.title: Create User API - boundary condition around constraints
steps: Verify the system handles boundary input correctly
test_cases.expected_result: Boundary values are handled according to product rules.

constraints: Password must be at least 8 characters
Role must be one of user, admin
